notes.sg-composite-material-composite-number: This is a mathematical concept, not related to composite materials manufacturing.
notes.sg-composite-material-printed-electronic: This is a sub-topic of flexible electronics.
notes.sg-composite-material-inkjet-printing: This is a specific type of printing technology, better grouped under a broader 'nanomaterials and printing technology' label.
notes.sg-composite-material-flexible-electroni: This is a broader category that encompasses printed, stretchable, and thin-film electronics.
notes.sg-composite-material-stretchable-electr: This is a sub-topic of flexible electronics.
notes.sg-composite-material-thin-film-transist: This is a specific type of thin film device, better grouped under the broader 'thin film' category.
notes.sg-composite-material-electrical-conduct: This is a component within electronic circuits.
notes.sg-composite-material-electronic-circuit: Relabeled to plural for better fit.
